en.title: Satellite NTN · Space-Ground Integrated EM Twin

fields.Badge: Vertical Datasheet · Satellite NTN / Satellite Non-Terrestrial Network
fields.Headline: Space-Ground Integrated EM Twin
fields.Headline-em: Stop leaving satellite signals "at the mercy of the sky" amid urban high-rises
fields.Sub: Large-scale LEO constellations, direct-to-cell, NB-IoT NTN, and NR NTN are pushing the "satellite-to-ground" link into the 3GPP mainstream. But urban building blockage, low-elevation-angle shadowing, and multi-beam / multi-satellite handover make link assurance for NTN terminals a new challenge. With three product layers, MetaRadio delivers a complete toolchain spanning simulation, HIL, and EM twin for space-ground integrated scenarios.

items.title: Badge
items.text: Vertical Datasheet · Satellite NTN / Satellite Non-Terrestrial Network

items.title: Eyebrow
items.text: Industry Vertical Market Solution

items.title: Headline
items.text: Space-Ground Integrated EM Twin

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: Stop leaving satellite signals "at the mercy of the sky" amid urban high-rises

items.title: Sub
items.text: Large-scale LEO constellations, direct-to-cell, NB-IoT NTN, and NR NTN are pushing the "satellite-to-ground" link into the 3GPP mainstream. But urban building blockage, low-elevation-angle shadowing, and multi-beam / multi-satellite handover make link assurance for NTN terminals a new challenge. With three product layers, MetaRadio delivers a complete toolchain spanning simulation, HIL, and EM twin for space-ground integrated scenarios.

sections.label: The Real Dilemma from Satellite to Ground
sections.heading: Challenge · The Real Dilemma from Satellite to Ground

fields.Title: "Satellite-to-ground" looks simple, but that last kilometer on the ground is the hardest
fields.Description: NTN link budgets are often approximated as "free space + shadow margin," yet in real deployments across cities, mountains, and indoors, multipath, penetration, shadowing, and multi-beam / multi-satellite handover make the link far more complex than the model.

table.Title: Urban Building Shadowing
table.Text: High-density buildings cause frequent shadow fading and multipath at low elevation angles, determining whether true "direct-to-cell" is possible.

table.Title: Multi-Satellite / Multi-Beam Handover
table.Text: Under LEO constellations, beam handovers are dense and inter-satellite handover latency is sensitive, easily causing dropped links and reconnection delays.

table.Title: Indoor Penetration
table.Text: Penetration loss models for terminals indoors, in vehicles, and aboard mass transit are highly empirical and lack deterministic prediction.

sections.label: Deploying the Three Product Layers in NTN
sections.heading: Solution · Deploying the Three Product Layers in NTN

fields.Title: Use ray tracing to precisely reconstruct "that last kilometer," then close the loop with HIL and twin validation
fields.Description: The three-layer solution covers the three stages of channel generation, terminal testing, and operations-grade EM situational awareness, making NTN business-level KPIs simulatable, testable, and continuously monitorable.

table.Description: Satellite trajectories + urban/mountain 3D + indoor penetration; outputs time-varying multipath and shadowing sequences for the space-ground link.
Real space-ground channels drive HIL testing and regression of NB-IoT NTN / NR NTN terminal modules.
Integrates with NTN network management/scheduling to render constellation coverage, beam landing points, and terminal reachability in real time.

table.Title: Constellation + Ground Modeling
table.Desc: TLE ephemeris + multi-beam radiation patterns + urban/mountain/indoor 3D models.

table.Title: Space-Ground Channel Generation
table.Desc: Generate time-varying CIR/PDP, Doppler, shadowing, and beam handover sequences along the trajectory.

table.Title: NTN Terminal HIL
table.Desc: Channel emulator drives NB-IoT/NR NTN modules, regressing TTFF, handover, and packet loss.

table.Title: Network Management Closed Loop
table.Desc: The EM twin outputs business-level coverage and reachability metrics, feeding back into scheduling strategy.

table.Spec: LEO / MEO / GEO; supports custom ephemeris and constellation configurations
3GPP NB-IoT NTN (Rel-17/18), NR NTN (Rel-17/18/19), ITU-R P.681
L/S/C/Ku/Ka/Q/V; supports direct-to-cell (D2D) and broadband NTN
Configurable from tens to hundreds of beams; includes beam landing trajectories and power spectra
Handheld terminals, IoT terminals, vehicular terminals, fixed VSAT, low-altitude/maritime terminals
Includes building penetration, vehicle penetration, and indoor multipath models; calibratable against field measurements
Link margin, reachability probability, handover risk, inter-satellite handover strategy evaluation
Satellite channel emulator, 5G NTN gNB, terminal OTA chamber
Private cloud, edge; supports integration with constellation operator network management

fields.Truly \"end-to-end\" NTN: Models both satellite trajectories and the urban/indoor ground side simultaneously, avoiding the traditional "write formulas in the sky, rely on experience on the ground."
fields.Multi-satellite handover determinism: Repeatable evaluation and regression of beam/inter-satellite handover under LEO constellations.
fields.Direct-to-cell simulation: Delivers deterministic conclusions on direct-to-cell link reachability under urban building shadowing.
fields.Domestic and controllable: Forms joint HIL solutions with domestic NTN gNB and terminal module vendors.
fields.Business-level KPIs: Beyond link margin, outputs business-level metrics such as TTFF, packet loss, and handover success rate.
fields.Twin integration: Overlays NTN coverage onto urban/campus EM twins to form a space-ground integrated view.

items.title: Truly "end-to-end" NTN
items.text: Models both satellite trajectories and the urban/indoor ground side simultaneously, avoiding the traditional "write formulas in the sky, rely on experience on the ground."

items.title: Multi-satellite handover determinism
items.text: Repeatable evaluation and regression of beam/inter-satellite handover under LEO constellations.

items.title: Direct-to-cell simulation
items.text: Delivers deterministic conclusions on direct-to-cell link reachability under urban building shadowing.

items.title: Domestic and controllable
items.text: Forms joint HIL solutions with domestic NTN gNB and terminal module vendors.

items.title: Business-level KPIs
items.text: Beyond link margin, outputs business-level metrics such as TTFF, packet loss, and handover success rate.

items.title: Twin integration
items.text: Overlays NTN coverage onto urban/campus EM twins to form a space-ground integrated view.

table.Title: Direct-to-Cell
table.Text: Coverage reachability and handover performance prediction for urban/suburban direct-to-cell.

table.Title: NB-IoT NTN
table.Text: Coverage and uplink reachability assessment for massive low-rate IoT terminals.

table.Title: Vehicular NTN
table.Text: Space-ground link stability and blind-spot assessment in high-speed mobility scenarios.

table.Title: Maritime/Aviation
table.Text: Reachability assessment and backup link design for deep-sea and low-altitude routes.

table.Title: Emergency Communications
table.Text: Temporary NTN coverage in disaster zones and service planning for urban re-entry.

table.Title: Constellation Planning
table.Text: Comparative end-to-end service capability simulation under different constellation configurations.

table.Label: Collaboration with domestic LEO constellation institutes / satellite operators
Joint HIL case studies across satellite + gNB + terminal

zh-CN.title: 卫星 NTN · 星地一体的电磁孪生

fields.Badge: Vertical Datasheet · 卫星 NTN / Satellite Non-Terrestrial Network
fields.Eyebrow: 行业垂直市场解决方案
fields.Headline: 星地一体的电磁孪生
fields.Headline-em: 让卫星信号在城市楼宇间，不再"看天吃饭"
fields.Sub: LEO 大规模星座、直连手机、NB-IoT NTN、NR NTN 正把"卫星到地面"的链路推进到 3GPP 主流。但城市建筑遮挡、低仰角阴影、多波束/多星切换让 NTN 终端的链路保障成为新的难题。乾径以三层产品在星地一体场景中提供从仿真、HIL 到电磁孪生的完整工具链。

items.title: Badge
items.text: Vertical Datasheet · 卫星 NTN / Satellite Non-Terrestrial Network

items.title: Eyebrow
items.text: 行业垂直市场解决方案

items.title: Headline
items.text: 星地一体的电磁孪生

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: 让卫星信号在城市楼宇间，不再"看天吃饭"

items.title: Sub
items.text: LEO 大规模星座、直连手机、NB-IoT NTN、NR NTN 正把"卫星到地面"的链路推进到 3GPP 主流。但城市建筑遮挡、低仰角阴影、多波束/多星切换让 NTN 终端的链路保障成为新的难题。乾径以三层产品在星地一体场景中提供从仿真、HIL 到电磁孪生的完整工具链。

table.Label: 城市穿透与多波束仿真

sections.label: 卫星到地面的真实困境
sections.heading: Challenge · 卫星到地面的真实困境

fields.Title: "卫星到地面"看似简单，地面那一公里最难
fields.Description: NTN 的链路预算往往按"自由空间 + 阴影裕度"近似，但在城市、山区、室内的真实部署中，多径、穿透、阴影与多波束/多星切换让链路远比模型复杂。

table.Title: 城市楼宇阴影
table.Text: 高密度建筑造成低仰角下的频繁阴影衰落与多径，决定能否真正"直连手机"。

table.Title: 多星多波束切换
table.Text: LEO 星座下波束切换密集、星间切换时延敏感，容易导致掉线与重连延迟。

table.Title: 室内穿透
table.Text: 终端在室内、车内、大众交通工具内的穿透损耗模型经验性强，缺乏确定性预测。

sections.label: 三层产品在 NTN 的部署
sections.heading: Solution · 三层产品在 NTN 的部署

fields.Title: 用射线跟踪精确还原"那最后一公里"，再用 HIL 与孪生闭环验证
fields.Description: 三层方案分别承担信道生成、终端测试与运营级电磁态势三个阶段，让 NTN 业务级 KPI 可仿真、可测试、可持续监测。

table.Description: 卫星轨迹 + 城市/山区 3D + 室内穿透；输出星地链路时变多径与阴影序列。
真实星地信道驱动 NB-IoT NTN / NR NTN 终端模组的 HIL 测试与回归。
与 NTN 网管/调度对接，实时呈现星座覆盖、波束着陆点与终端可达性。

table.Title: 星座 + 地面建模
table.Desc: TLE 星历 + 多波束方向图 + 城市/山区/室内 3D 模型。

table.Title: 星地信道生成
table.Desc: 沿轨迹生成时变 CIR/PDP、Doppler、阴影、波束切换序列。

table.Title: NTN 终端 HIL
table.Desc: 信道仿真仪驱动 NB-IoT/NR NTN 模组，回归 TTFF、切换、丢包。

table.Title: 网管闭环
table.Desc: 电磁孪生输出业务级覆盖与可达性指标，反馈调度策略。

table.规格: LEO / MEO / GEO；支持自定义星历与星座配置
L/S/C/Ku/Ka/Q/V；支持直连手机 (D2D) 与宽带 NTN
可配置数十至数百波束；包含波束着陆轨迹与功率谱
手持终端、IoT 终端、车载终端、固定 VSAT、低空/海事终端
含建筑物穿透、车辆穿透、室内多径模型；与实测可校正
链路裕度、可达概率、切换风险、星间换星策略评估
卫星信道仿真器、5G NTN gNB、终端 OTA 暗室
私有云、边缘；支持星座运营商网管对接

fields.真正\"端到端\"NTN: 同时建模卫星轨迹与城市/室内地面端，避免传统"天上写公式、地上靠经验"。
fields.多星切换确定性: LEO 星座下波束/星间切换的可重复评估与回归。
fields.直连手机仿真: 城市楼宇阴影下的直连手机链路可达性给出确定性结论。
fields.国产可控: 与国产 NTN gNB 与终端模组厂家形成联合 HIL 方案。
fields.业务级 KPI: 不只链路裕度，输出 TTFF、丢包、切换成功率等业务级指标。
fields.与孪生联动: 把 NTN 覆盖叠加到城市/园区电磁孪生，形成天地一体视图。

items.title: 真正"端到端"NTN
items.text: 同时建模卫星轨迹与城市/室内地面端，避免传统"天上写公式、地上靠经验"。

items.title: 多星切换确定性
items.text: LEO 星座下波束/星间切换的可重复评估与回归。

items.title: 直连手机仿真
items.text: 城市楼宇阴影下的直连手机链路可达性给出确定性结论。

items.title: 国产可控
items.text: 与国产 NTN gNB 与终端模组厂家形成联合 HIL 方案。

items.title: 业务级 KPI
items.text: 不只链路裕度，输出 TTFF、丢包、切换成功率等业务级指标。

items.title: 与孪生联动
items.text: 把 NTN 覆盖叠加到城市/园区电磁孪生，形成天地一体视图。

table.Title: 直连手机
table.Text: 城市/郊区直连手机覆盖可达性与切换性能预测。

table.Title: NB-IoT NTN
table.Text: 海量低速 IoT 终端的覆盖与上行可达性评估。

table.Title: 车载 NTN
table.Text: 高速移动场景下星地链路稳定性与盲区评估。

table.Title: 海事/航空
table.Text: 远海与低空航线的可达性评估与备份链路设计。

table.Title: 应急通信
table.Text: 灾区临时 NTN 覆盖与城市再入业务规划。

table.Title: 星座规划
table.Text: 不同星座配置下的端到端业务能力对比仿真。

table.Label: 国产 LEO 星座研究院 / 卫星运营方合作
与 3GPP NTN 标准跟进同步
卫星 + gNB + 终端联合 HIL 案例
